body.title: [sprint] Repoint igor gateway.reason() onto Proxy dispatch() (tier ladder -> rules_engine)
body.intention: I intend that igor's reason() path gets inference from the canonical Proxy, not direct providers, with its (text,cost,used_api) contract preserved.
body.description:
**Problem:** inference_gateway.py InferenceGateway.reason() (L423, impl L439-~810) runs igor's tier ladder by calling direct reasoners (_t2 OllamaReasoner, _t3/_t35/_t4 OpenRouterReasoner built in from_env L356-417), bypassing the Proxy (feedback_inference_proxy_only). reason() signature is frozen across ~13 callers (voice_ab.py:205, llm_peer_advisor.py:154, shadow_reasoner.py:192, main.py:3426/5444/5964/6078) returning (text:str, cost:float, used_api:bool).
**Proposed shape (frozen-signature seam):** Keep reason()'s signature EXACTLY; replace its body to (1) assemble messages+system from (user_input, relevant, core, cortex, thread_id) — LIFT build_twm_context (L1449) + per-reasoner prompt builders out of the reasoners into a shared assembler behind reason(); (2) build an InferenceRequest(messages, system, task_class derived from level/is_user_turn/complexity, agent_id/instance_id/session_id); (3) call InferenceDevice().dispatch(req) (device.py:242) lazy-loaded+injectable per reader/summarizer/evaluator pattern; (4) return (resp.text, resp.cost_estimate, used_api derived from resp.source_kind [T-proxy-source-kind]). Map cascade: local->cloud tier ladder ↔ rules_engine billing cascade (foreground=True flips flat_rate->usage_based); local_only ↔ force local. skip_to is already dead (D198) — drop it.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py (reason/_reason_impl, from_env, build_twm_context); cognition/reasoners/*.py (prompt builders relocated). HIGH INERTIA — every igor turn flows through reason(); requires Akien inline pre-approval before edits.
**Design rules:** Inference-Proxy-only; no direct OR/Anthropic imports; log every interface crossing; device.py design center.
**Scope boundary:** IN — reason() path repointed through dispatch() with (text,cost,used_api) preserved; prompt-assembly relocation behind reason(); behavioral parity on local vs escalate routing. OUT — call()/DAG surface (T-inf-reroute-B); deleting dead reasoner classes (T-inf-reroute-C); the 3 bypassers (T-igor-inference-bypassers); Proxy internals.
**Test plan:** (1) a reason() call routes through a stubbed/spy InferenceDevice.dispatch (assert dispatch called, NOT _t4.reason). (2) used_api reconstructed: local source_kind -> used_api False (-> PROC_ROUTING_LOCAL), cloud -> True. (3) behavioral: is_user_turn cloud path vs non-user-turn local path select the expected task_class/source. (4) callers unchanged (signature frozen).
**Completion criteria:** igor reason() inference flows through the Proxy; (text,cost,used_api) contract intact; tests green.

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)

[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
